item.title: 'Silencing' the Instinct MI 50
item.description:
The Instinct MI 50

As noted in my previous post about the MI 50, I was plagued by a beeping sound that came directly from the card. Originally, I thought that it must come from the motherboard, since I was not aware of a GPU that had a physical beeper. But during the teardown, I could see that the card indeed has a beeper just like a normal motherboard. It is highlighted in the next picture.
